attacking_style: Attacks early from breakaways on climbs, but lacks finishing power to sustain efforts to the line. Classic opportunistic climber moves without elite punch.
team_tactics: EF Education willing to invest high-quality domestiques (Bettiol) into breakaway setups for low-probability outcomes. Team prioritizes positioning over preservation.
terrain_preference: Hilly one-day races with multiple climbs where breakaway survival matters more than explosive finishing. Exposed on punchy finales requiring sustained high-end power.
vulnerability: Lacks elite-level finishing legs after hard efforts. Gets caught after initiating attacks, suggesting power duration limitations on critical climbs.
key_patterns: Attacks first from established breakaways but gets reabsorbed, pattern across GT and Monument (2 races)
Survives deep into hilly races from breaks, showing endurance over explosive power (2 observations)
Team deploys quality domestiques for his breakaway gambles despite low win probability (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent breakaway role across 2021-2022 without progression in finishing capability or attack success rate
